=== SECTION: CHARGE ===

R v Ava Quinn

Statement of Offence:
Stalking involving fear of violence, contrary to section 4A of the Protection from Harassment Act 1997

Particulars of Offence:
Between 1 February 2026 and 20 April 2026 pursued Jordan Hale on at least two occasions causing fear of violence.

MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT

Officer in case: DC Shaw 3312

Headline Summary
The prosecution relies on a served screenshot and message pack, a phone extraction summary, and complainant account. Full phone download, subscriber data, and final signed MG11 are outstanding. Attribution is asserted in police papers but not fully proved on current disclosure.
